effective_profile.description: Current executable UI profile. Documents real desktop behavior first while keeping governance convergence targets visible.
known_realities: Feature CSS currently includes visual properties in @layer feature.
Inline style is used for CSS variable injection in limited locations.

target_profile.feature_css_policy: Feature CSS should remain structural; visual tokens should come from ui/styles token contract.
target_profile.inline_style_policy: Prefer class/token usage; inline style should be avoided unless approved exception exists.
target_profile.hardcoded_literal_policy: Hardcoded color/shadow literals should be removed from feature CSS.
target_profile.governance_gate_expectation: spec approval aligned + code audit scopes covering desktop renderer paths.

known_deviations.title: Feature CSS visual-token drift in desktop renderer stylesheet
known_deviations.impact: Current desktop UI remains executable, but policy-level feature_css_audit expectations are not met.
known_deviations.follow_up_entrypoint: Future UI convergence task should migrate visual literals and visual properties into token/contract layers.

known_deviations.title: Inline style usage for topic year range CSS variables
known_deviations.impact: Violates strict no-inline-style governance rule but is currently used for dynamic range rendering.
known_deviations.follow_up_entrypoint: Replace with class-based CSS variable strategy or approve a narrow exception with expiry.

known_deviations.title: UI governance scan root does not include monorepo desktop renderer path
known_deviations.impact: Gate reports can pass/fail approval checks without scanning actual desktop renderer files.
known_deviations.follow_up_entrypoint: Extend include_roots for monorepo desktop paths in a dedicated governance convergence task.

known_deviations.title: UI spec approval fingerprint mismatch
known_deviations.impact: Spec-change approval must be refreshed before expecting green governance gate.
known_deviations.follow_up_entrypoint: Run approval flow in a separate governance/ops step; this document task does not approve or alter gate policy.

notes.tailwind_boundary: Tailwind is allowed for layout only; do not use it for color/typography/radius/shadow/spacing.
notes.global_vs_feature_css: Global UI lives in ui/styles (layers reset/tokens/contract). Feature CSS must stay in @layer feature and must not define visual tokens.
notes.change_policy: Theme changes are token-only. Contract expansion requires RFC + approval.
notes.interpretation_rule: When effective_profile and target_profile diverge, current execution behavior follows effective_profile and must be explained by known_deviations.
